title: Building E-Shop Cosmetics: A Full-Stack E-Commerce Platform
titleVi: Xây Dựng E-Shop Cosmetics: Nền Tảng Thương Mại Điện Tử Mỹ Phẩm
excerpt: A deep dive into building a full-stack cosmetics e-commerce platform with ReactJS, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, VNPay payment, AI chatbot integration, and role-based access control.
excerptVi: Tìm hiểu quá trình xây dựng nền tảng thương mại điện tử mỹ phẩm với ReactJS, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, thanh toán VNPay, tích hợp AI chatbot và phân quyền người dùng.
content:
## Overview

E-Shop Cosmetics is a comprehensive e-commerce platform built to handle the entire online shopping experience — from product discovery to payment and delivery tracking.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: ReactJS with Vite and Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Java 21, Spring Boot (Modular Architecture, Clean Architecture)
- **Database**: PostgreSQL
- **Cache**: Redis
- **Storage**: AWS S3
- **Payment**: VNPay, COD, SePay
- **Auth**: JWT, Google OAuth2
- **AI**: Gemini API for chatbot and product consultation
- **Email**: SMTP/Brevo

## Key Features

### 1. Complete E-Commerce Flow
Users can register, browse products, manage a shopping cart, place orders, and track shipments from CREATED → CONFIRMED → SHIPPING → COMPLETED. Cancellation is also supported.

### 2. VNPay Payment Integration
One of the core modules handles VNPay payment gateway integration including transaction creation, payment redirect, callback handling, and IPN processing.

### 3. AI-Powered Product Consultation
Gemini API powers both an interactive chatbot and an AI Agent that helps users find suitable cosmetics based on skin type, concerns, and ingredients.

### 4. Role-Based Access Control
The system supports four roles: Guest, Customer, Staff, and Admin — each with specific permissions across the platform and admin dashboard.

### 5. Admin Dashboard
Staff and Admin users can manage products, orders, customers, vouchers, inventory, and view search analytics.

### 6. Real-Time Support Chat
Customers can chat in real-time with support staff directly from the website.

## Architecture

The backend follows a modular monolith pattern with clean architecture principles. Each business domain (product, order, payment, auth, etc.) is organized as an independent module, making the codebase maintainable and easy to extend.

## My Contributions

I was responsible for:
- Developing the payment module and integrating VNPay
- Building order tracking with multi-status workflow
- Implementing product detail views and AI consultation features
- Connecting the React frontend with Spring Boot REST APIs
- Testing and refining the end-to-end shopping experience

## Challenges

Handling VNPay's callback and IPN flows required careful state management to ensure transaction consistency. Building the AI consultation feature also required thoughtful prompt engineering to deliver relevant product recommendations.

## Conclusion

E-Shop Cosmetics demonstrates a full-stack approach to modern e-commerce development, combining robust backend architecture with a responsive React frontend and cutting-edge AI features.
